allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "touch /app/models/test_write && rm /app/models/test_write && echo OK")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "touch /app/data/processed/test_write && rm /app/data/processed/test_write && echo OK")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "touch /app/models/test_write && rm /app/models/test_write && echo OK-WRITE")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -d quantmind-api sh -c 'for T in AAPL TSLA MSFT GOOGL AMZN NVDA; do echo "=== TRAINING $T ===" >> /app/models/training.log 2>&1; python train.py --ticker $T --data-path /app/data --step all >> /app/models/training.log 2>&1; done; echo DONE >> /app/models/training.log')
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "tail -20 /app/models/training.log 2>&1; echo '---PROC---'; ps aux | grep -E 'python|train' | grep -v grep")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "ls /proc/[0-9]*/comm 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo \\"{}: \\$\(cat {}\)\\"' 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':$' | head -20")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "ls /proc/[0-9]*/comm 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo \\"{}: \\$\(cat {}\)\\"' 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':$' | tail -5")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "python -c \\"import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv\('/app/data/processed/AAPL.csv',index_col='Date',parse_dates=True\); print\('Range :',df.index.min\(\).date\(\),'→',df.index.max\(\).date\(\)\); print\('Total :',len\(df\),'jours'\); print\('Cutoff Kaggle \(2017-11\):',len\(df[df.index<='2017-11-10']\),'jours avant'\); print\('Apres 2017-11:',len\(df[df.index>'2017-11-10']\),'jours \(yfinance\)'\)\\"")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "grep -E 'yfinance|Kaggle|Total' /app/models/training.log | tail -30")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "tail -100 /app/models/training.log | head -50")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec quantmind-api sh -c "tail -3 /app/models/training.log; echo '---LOG SECTIONS---'; grep -E '=== ' /app/models/training.log")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Params LSTM:',d['lstm']['total_params'],'| Dir Acc:',d['lstm']['training'].get\('directional_accuracy'\),'%'\); rl=d['ppo']['results']; bh=d['ppo']['buy_and_hold']; print\('RL Sharpe:',rl.get\('sharpe_ratio'\),'vs B&H:',bh.get\('sharpe_ratio'\)\); print\('RL Return:',rl.get\('total_return'\),'% vs B&H:',bh.get\('total_return'\),'%'\)")
